title: MakakitoConfig
description: Canonical configuration for a Makakito chaos-engineering playground session. Produced by the builder, consumed by the runner and CLI.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Must match the config package SchemaVersion constant.

services.description: List of services that make up the playground environment.

Playground.description: Describes the type and identity of the chaos-engineering playground.

type.description: Playground topology type. Determines which Docker Compose template the runner uses.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the playground purpose.

Service.description: A single containerised service in the playground.

name.description: Unique service identifier within the playground.

image.description: Docker image reference (name:tag or full registry path).

type.description: Logical role of the service. Used by the runner to apply appropriate chaos strategies.

port.description: Primary port exposed by the service.

env.description: Environment variables injected into the container. Keys and values are arbitrary strings.

dependsOn.description: Names of services that must be healthy before this service starts.

replicas.description: Number of container replicas. Defaults to 1 when omitted.

Resources.description: CPU and memory limits for a service container.

Experiment.description: The chaos experiment to execute against the playground.

description.description: Optional description of what the experiment is testing.

scenario.description: Path to the scenario YAML file (relative to the config file, or absolute).

targetService.description: Name of the service to inject faults into. Must match a name in services[].

durationSeconds.description: Override the scenario's default experiment duration in seconds.

parameters.description: Scenario-specific override parameters. Keys and values are defined by the scenario author.

Report.description: Controls how experiment results are persisted.

outputFormat.description: Format(s) to write the experiment report in.

includeMetricsSnapshot.description: When true, a snapshot of service metrics at experiment end is embedded in the report.

outputPath.description: Directory where report files are written. Defaults to './reports' when omitted.

Traffic.description: Inline traffic-generation settings for the experiment. A lightweight alternative to a full traffic-profile YAML (v1.1+).

requestsPerSecond.description: Sustained request rate aimed at the target service.

connections.description: Number of concurrent connections to maintain.

targetService.description: Name of the service to send traffic to. Defaults to the experiment's targetService when omitted.

durationSeconds.description: How long to generate traffic for. Defaults to the experiment's durationSeconds when omitted.
